info.name: Workspace App API
info.description:
A comprehensive project management API with features including:
        - Workspace and team management with subscription plans
        - Hierarchical task organization (Workspaces → Spaces → Lists → Tasks)
        - Real-time collaboration via WebSockets
        - Recurring tasks with cron-based automation
        - Task dependencies with cascading logic
        - Advanced analytics and reporting
        - File attachments via Cloudinary
        - Activity tracking and commenting
        - Custom fields and time tracking
        - Custom tables with Excel-like features
        - Document management and collaboration
        - Direct messaging between users
        - Push notifications (FCM)
        - Entitlement and subscription management
        - Super admin dashboard

item.name: 0. ⭐ Primary Dashboard
item.description: 🚀 ALL-IN-ONE consolidated data endpoint. Use GET /api/workspaces/{id}/analytics for the main Flutter screen — returns workspace stats, hierarchy, members, tasks, announcements, timer, sticky note, and performance in a single call.

item.name: 🚀 PRIMARY DASHBOARD — Get All Workspace Data in One Call

query.description: Optional: workspace|personal. Backend enforces personal for non-privileged users.
Optional inclusive start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for task/performance windows.
Optional inclusive end date (YYYY-MM-DD) for task/performance windows.

request.description: Primary dashboard endpoint. Returns workspace info, scoped stats, lightweight dashboard space summaries, availability, announcements, recent activity, sticky note, timers, and performance data. The `hierarchy` field is a dashboard-oriented per-space summary, not the full navigation tree.

item.name: 4.1 Tasks — Core CRUD
item.description: Create, read, update, delete tasks. Includes assignees, priority, status, due dates, subtasks, and bulk operations.

request.description:
Creates a dependency relationship between two tasks for Gantt chart functionality.

**Dependency Types:**
- **FS (Finish-to-Start):** Target task can't start until source task finishes
- **SS (Start-to-Start):** Target task can't start until source task starts
- **FF (Finish-to-Finish):** Target task can't finish until source task finishes
- **SF (Start-to-Finish):** Target task can't finish until source task starts

**Cascading Logic:**
When the source task's dates change, the target task's dates are automatically
adjusted based on the dependency type. This cascades through the entire dependency chain.

**Circular Dependency Protection:**
The system prevents circular dependencies using a visited set during cascade operations.
Creates a new task within a specific list. Supports regular tasks, recurring tasks, and milestones.
Creates a subtask under a parent task
Soft deletes a task (sets isDeleted flag). Also cleans up associated attachments from Cloudinary.
Returns full task details including assignee, custom fields, hierarchical subtasks (parentTask and subtasks list), and time tracking summary.
Retrieves all subtasks of a parent task

item.name: Get all tasks in a list

request.description: Retrieves all tasks within a specific list with optional filtering
Retrieves all tasks that depend on the current task (tasks blocked by this one)
Retrieves all tasks that the current task depends on (tasks blocking this one)
Removes a dependency relationship between two tasks

Updates task properties. Automatically tracks changes and creates activity entries.

**Auto-tracked fields:**
- Status changes
- Assignee changes
- Priority changes
- Due date changes
- Start date changes
- Title changes

**Gantt Integration:**
When startDate or dueDate is changed, dependent tasks are automatically cascaded
based on their dependency type (FS, SS, FF, SF).

**Completion Tracking:**
When status changes to 'done', completedAt timestamp is automatically set.

item.name: 4.2 Tasks — Dependencies
item.description: Gantt-style task dependencies: Finish-to-Start, Start-to-Start, Finish-to-Finish, Start-to-Finish.

request.description: Create a dependency relationship between two tasks
Remove a dependency relationship between tasks
Retrieve all tasks that are blocking this task
Retrieve all dependencies for a task

item.name: 4.3 Tasks — Recurring
item.description: Set up recurring tasks with daily/weekly/monthly/custom frequency. Manage and preview the recurring schedule.

item.name: Get all recurring tasks in a workspace

request.description: Retrieves all active recurring tasks within a workspace

item.name: Get instances of a recurring task

request.description:
Retrieves all task instances that were automatically created from a recurring task.

Each time a recurring task is processed by the cron job, a new instance is created
with isRecurring=false and recurringTaskId pointing to the original task.

Manually triggers the recurring task processor (normally runs via cron every hour).

**Processing Logic:**
1. Finds all tasks where isRecurring=true AND nextOccurrence <= now
2. Checks if recurrenceEnd has not been exceeded
3. Clones each task (copies title, description, priority, assignee, etc.)
4. Sets cloned task status to 'todo' and isRecurring to false
5. Updates original task's nextOccurrence based on frequency and interval
6. Emits real-time socket events for new tasks

**Frequency Calculation:**
- daily: adds interval days
- weekly: adds interval * 7 days
- monthly: adds interval months
- custom: adds interval days

**Use Case:** Testing or immediate processing without waiting for cron

Stops a recurring task from creating new instances.

This sets isRecurring=false and clears the nextOccurrence date.
Existing instances are not affected.

Updates the caller's workspace chat read cursor (`Workspace.members[].lastChatReadAt`) to the current server time. This clears unread state for messages visible up to the mark time.

item.name: 6.2 Files — Task Attachments
item.description: Attach and manage files on individual tasks.

request.description:
Saves attachment metadata after successful Cloudinary upload.

**Call this after:**
1. Getting credentials from init-upload
2. Uploading file to Cloudinary
3. Receiving Cloudinary response

**Automatic Features:**
- Thumbnail generation for images
- File size and MIME type extraction
- Secure URL generation

Deletes an attachment from both the database and Cloudinary.

**Cleanup Process:**
1. Removes file from Cloudinary using public_id
2. Deletes database record
3. Returns confirmation

**Automatic Cleanup:**
When a task is hard-deleted, all attachments are automatically removed.

item.name: Get all attachments for a task

request.description: Retrieves all file attachments associated with a task from Cloudinary

Generates a signed upload URL for direct client-to-Cloudinary uploads.

**Two-Step Upload Process:**
1. Call this endpoint to get upload credentials
2. Upload file directly to Cloudinary from client
3. Call confirm endpoint with Cloudinary response

**Benefits:**
- Faster uploads (direct to CDN)
- Reduced server load
- Better user experience

item.name: 12. Webhooks
item.description: External integration endpoints for GitHub and other third-party services.

request.description:
Receiver for GitHub Push events. 
1. Verifies 'x-hub-signature-256' header using the Space's secret.
2. Attributes commits to users by email or verified githubUsername.
3. Logs activity to the space.
4. Posts notification to the #Commit Log channel.

item.name: 13. GitHub Integration
item.description: Configure GitHub repositories and webhooks for real-time space activity.

request.description: Retrieve the webhook URL and secret for connecting a GitHub repository to this space.
Generate an HMAC secret and link a GitHub repository name to this space.
